score_rationale: Figure scoring and visual review are unavailable because no figure asset, legend, source data, Results citation, or marking scheme is supplied.

must_fix.issue: Figure asset and legend are missing, so visual and panel-level review are blocked.

figure_legend_provenance.needed_detail: figure asset, legend/caption, source data, and citing Results text

policy_guideline_boundaries.note: Visual or panel-level findings require actual assets or sufficiently detailed descriptions.

routing_decisions.rationale: No figure asset or legend is available.

severity_classifications.rationale: Missing figure inputs block this review mode but do not create a rubric failure without a rubric.

uncertainty.reason: No figure asset or legend is present.
uncertainty.needed_to_resolve: Provide figure files, legends/captions, source data, and Results text.

draft_stage_caveats: This is a toy figure gate fixture, not a figure review.
next_actions: Provide figure assets and legends before visual review.
Provide marking scheme before scored figure review.
